prompt: Create a dark, highly detailed gothic anime illustration of two androgynous punk-lolita characters seated close together in an ornate candlelit Victorian room. The left character is a tall slim demon-like young man with messy black hair, pale skin, exposed chest and abs under sheer black lace, layered chokers and necklaces with cross and pentagram pendants, many rings, black leather pants with zippers, belts, chains, buckles, and a deep navy-black fur-trimmed jacket; one large black bat wing rises behind his left shoulder. The right character is a petite gothic lolita girl leaning against him, with long wavy dark brown hair braided and decorated with many tiny pink bows and heart clips, wearing a black lace bodice, pink ribbons, layered pink-and-black tutu skirt, fishnet stockings, strapped platform boots, chains, star charms, and an oversized pale pink fur-trimmed coat; one pale feathered angel wing is visible behind her right shoulder. Count exactly two visible wings total: one black bat wing on the left character and one pale feathered wing on the right character. Their faces are intentionally hidden by soft-edged opaque brown rectangular censor blocks, one larger rectangle over the taller character’s face and one smaller rectangle over the girl’s face. Use a moody romantic composition, close cropped vertical portrait, bodies intertwined, luxurious gothic accessories, lace textures, metallic chains, leather straps, fur, bows, crosses, pentagrams, hearts, and star charms. Background: dim antique interior with gilded picture frames, dark wallpaper, and a few tall candles glowing on the right. Lighting is low-key and cinematic, with warm candle highlights and cool purple-black shadows, ultra-detailed digital painting, dramatic dark fantasy fashion editorial atmosphere, black, midnight blue, dusty pink, mauve, and candlelit gold.
